untranslatable_reason: The signal relies on Gann angle analysis (primary 1x1 45° line and 1x2 support line), which is a geometric price/time construction not available in the allowed indicator set. No standard technical indicator directly replicates Gann angles. Substituted with SMA-50 as a trend-following proxy, but this does not capture the true 45° angle or reversal-filtering mechanics described in the source material.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN strategy emphasizes trend following with Gann angles to filter noise. Since Gann constructions (45° line, 1x1, 1x2 angles) are not available, used SMA-50 as a pragmatic trend-following substitute. This approximates trend direction but loses the precise geometric reversal-filtering benefit. For accurate implementation, a custom Gann angle indicator would be required. Exit conditions derived from signal reversal against the trend line (AUTHOR_SILENT guidance).
